title: Example Random Entity Textures
description: An example of OptiFine random entity textures
body:
# Example Random Entity Textures ## An example of OptiFine random entity textures
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/example-random-entity-textures)

This is an example resource pack that shows users how to create OptiFine random entity textures. Included examples: - Randomised textures - Weight based textures - Name based textures - Biome based textures - NBT based textures Using the provided examples, you should be able to understand how OptiFine random entity textures works, and be able to apply it to your own resource pack.
